title: conyza mexicana
intro: Conyza mexicana, also known as Mexican fleabane or Mexican daisy, is a perennial herb native to Mexico and parts of Central America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Mexican medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant is rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, which are believed to contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Conyza mexicana can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
